scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @tdc/engine && npm run build --workspace @tdc/rules && npm run build --workspace @tdc/setup-config
scripts.test:ci: npm run build:packages && vitest --run apps/server/src apps/web/src/setup.contract.test.ts packages/engine/src packages/rules/src packages/turn-system/src packages/ai-core/src packages/ai-strategies/src packages/ai-manager/src packages/difficulty/src packages/sim/src
scripts.coverage: npm run build:packages && vitest --run --coverage packages/engine/src packages/rules/src packages/turn-system/src packages/ai-core/src packages/ai-strategies/src packages/ai-manager/src packages/difficulty/src packages/sim/src
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run test:ci && npm run coverage && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace @tdc/server && npm run build --workspace @tdc/web
